ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO country code */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Official name of the country */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "land_area" REAL /* Land area in square kilometers */,
  "water_area" REAL /* Water area in square kilometers */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the country */,
  "population_growth" REAL /* Annual population growth rate in percentage */,
  "birth_rate" REAL /* Birth rate per 1,000 inhabitants */,
  "death_rate" REAL /* Death rate per 1,000 inhabitants */,
  "migration_rate" REAL /* Net migration rate per 1,000 inhabitants */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the record */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Name of the capital city */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Official currency of the country */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language(s) of the country */,
  "government_form" TEXT /* Type of government (e.g., republic, monarchy) */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product in USD */,
  "gdp_growth_rate" REAL /* Annual GDP growth rate in percentage */,
  "life_expectancy" REAL /* Average life expectancy in years */,
  "literacy_rate" REAL /* Literacy rate in percentage */,
  "last_census_year" INTEGER /* Year of the last national census */,
  "last_data_update_year" INTEGER /* Year when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "region_description" TEXT /* Description of the geographical or political region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the region */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "average_gdp" REAL /* Average GDP of countries in the region */,
  "average_life_expectancy" REAL /* Average life expectancy in the region */,
  "average_literacy_rate" REAL /* Average literacy rate in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries_regions" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier referencing the country */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier referencing the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id", "region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country the data belongs to */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* JSON data containing age distribution statistics */,
  "gender_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of males to females in the population */,
  "urban_population_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the population living in urban areas */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the population */,
  "dependency_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of non-working-age population to working-age population */,
  "fertility_rate" REAL /* Total fertility rate */,
  "child_mortality_rate" REAL /* Child mortality rate per 1,000 live births */,
  "youth_population_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the population aged 0-14 */,
  "working_population_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the population aged 15-64 */,
  "elderly_population_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the population aged 65+ */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "migration_data" (
  "migration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each migration record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country the data pertains to */,
  "immigration_rate" REAL /* Rate of immigration per 1,000 inhabitants */,
  "emigration_rate" REAL /* Rate of emigration per 1,000 inhabitants */,
  "net_migration" REAL /* Net migration rate calculated as immigration minus emigration */,
  "internal_migration_rate" REAL /* Rate of internal migration within the country */,
  "migration_trends" TEXT /* Summary of migration trends and patterns */,
  "last_migration_data_year" INTEGER /* Year when the migration data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("migration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_migration_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
